articles.content: Bahamians must not let concerns over 20 percent-plus fee increases distract them from the true banking “elephant in the room” - the “tremendous untapped potential” for job and business creation from the near-$3.5bn locked in the country’s financial system.
articles.author: Bahamas Tribune

articles.title: Linking pay to performance isn’t the best way to fix government bureaucracies
articles.excerpt: Governments often see performance-linked pay as a solution to inefficient public institutions. But in practice, it rarely works as intended. Reforms should stop trying something that usually ends in a costly and distracting failure and instead focus their ene…
